methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 24 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Ukrspecsystems is a Growth-stage Defense & Security company founded by Kostyuk Vyacheslav Nikolaevich, with funding derived from Ministry of Defence contracts. The comparable universe in Defense & Security spans 24 same-sector peers, comprising 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms including Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries.

Peer-Median valuation methodology is not applicable in this case. The target lacks sufficient same-stage comparables—zero peers matched both sector and stage criteria; only one adjacent-stage peer was identified, falling well short of the three-datapoint minimum required for statistical reliability. Broadening to all-sector medians would introduce material bias given the heterogeneity of Growth-stage companies across Defense & Security verticals, different customer concentration profiles, and contract structures.

Given the inapplicability of traditional comparable company analysis, alternative approaches (DCF sensitivity analysis anchored to contract-derived cash flow, precedent transaction analysis within the Defense & Security subsector, or strategic acquisition multiples from recent M&A in unmanned systems and autonomous defense) would be required to establish a defensible valuation range. The primary uncertainty is the absence of a tight peer cohort, limiting triangulation to market-rate methodologies. The MoD-contract funding model itself—non-dilutive but operationally constrained—presents an additional variable distinguishing this company from venture-backed Defense & Security peers in the comparable set.
